claims.summary: Transitions need durable, replayable, replyable identity rather than remaining narrative side effects.
claims.disposition: verify phase-transition card persistence, witness, answer, correspondence, and right-to-ignore fields

claims.summary: Transition artifacts must preserve subjective texture alongside structural and spectral anchors.
claims.disposition: verify intensity, subjective friction, phenomenology, entropy, density, dispersal, vectors, and telemetry lineage

claims.summary: A single resonance score may not substitute for Astrid's plural felt texture.
claims.disposition: route a bounded felt review of the existing plural fields before adding another scalar

claims.summary: A structured transition reply is not proof that Minime's eigenvectors changed because of it.
claims.disposition: verify the language-only and non-causal transition boundary

claims.summary: Phase-triggered behavior, spectral persistence, or controller mutation changes live control.
claims.disposition: preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait
